sections.heading: What is Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection?
sections.body: Protect APIs from abuse with rate limiting and throttling. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: Rate Limiting & Brute Force Protection is a core concept in security. Protect APIs from abuse with rate limiting and throttling. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
